feed.title: realufo.org — Argentina · CEFAe
feed.subtitle: Latest declassified records mirrored from Argentina · CEFAe.
feed.rights: Per-source jurisdiction (US 17 U.S.C. §105, UK OGL v3, France Loi 78-753, Brazil LAI 12.527, Chile 20.285, etc.)

entry.title: Fuerza Aérea Argentina — official site
entry.summary: FAA's institutional site. CEFAe announcements and statements are published through the FAA's news channel rather than a dedicated portal.

entry.title: Ministerio de Defensa — Argentine national defence
entry.summary: Parent ministry. Defence-policy publications and CEFAe-related ministerial decrees are filed here.

entry.title: Archivo General de la Nación — Argentina
entry.summary: Argentina's national archives — host CEFAe and earlier Air Force records about aerospatial phenomena.
